3181040.name: Dream Eater Girl
3181040.description:
A girl ventures into a nightmare to find her lost sister, facing countless monsters and powerful bosses. Use items and upgrades to enhance your survival and delve deeper into the nightmare.

This game is a single-player action game that combines roguelike elements with RPG mechanics featuring permanent progression. Enter instanced dungeons based on villages, defeat enemies, and collect gold to strengthen your character. Each dungeon has a powerful boss, and you’ll need to dodge bullet patterns and attacks while overcoming your foes.
